inputs.label: Patio Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the patio area to be paved.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the patio area to be paved.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la zone de terrasse à paver.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del área del patio a pavimentar.

inputs.label: Patio Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the patio area to be paved.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the patio area to be paved.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la zone de terrasse à paver.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho del área del patio a pavimentar.

inputs.label: Paver Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single paving stone.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single paving stone.

inputs.label: Paver Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of a single paving stone.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of a single paving stone.

inputs.label: Joint Gap
inputs.businessContext: Gap between pavers (e.g., mortar joint width).

businessContext_i18n.en: Gap between pavers (e.g., mortar joint width).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parke taşları arasındaki boşluk (örneğin harç derz genişliği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen den Pflastersteinen (z. B. Mörtelfugenbreite).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Espace entre les pavés (ex. largeur du joint de mortier).
businessContext_i18n.es: Separación entre losas (p. ej., ancho de junta de mortero).

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Extra material factor for cutting and breakage (e.g., 0.05 = 5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra material factor for cutting and breakage (e.g., 0.05 = 5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve kırılma için ek malzeme faktörü (örneğin 0,05 = %5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zuschlagfaktor für Verschnitt und Bruch (z. B. 0,05 = 5 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de matériau supplémentaire pour la coupe et la casse (ex. 0,05 = 5%).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de material extra para cortes y roturas (p. ej., 0.05 = 5%).

inputs.label: Cost per Paver
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost of one paver (in currency units).

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit cost of one paver (in currency units).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir parke taşının birim maliyeti (para birimi cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unitaire d'un pavé (en unités monétaires).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste unitario de una losa (en unidades monetarias).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
